pdp.hero.headline.value: The frame that fills itself with photos

pdp.cta.weak.value: Learn more about our frames today

meta.description.value: A wifi digital photo frame that shows photos sent by text, email, or web upload — no subscription, no app needed for senders.

claim.no-sub.value: No subscription required — included with your one-time purchase of the frame.

pdp.hero.dup.value: The frame that fills itself with photos

pdp.body.intro.value: Photos arrive automaticaly — no app needed for senders.

pdp.body.aiism.value: It isn't just a frame — it's a story. Setup is the easy part; the hard part is remembering to print. Fast, simple, and beautiful.
